summary: Prashnakosh V1 Production Readiness Testing Complete - All branding requirements verified. Login page redesigned with shield logo, gold button, no Sanskrit text. Question editing functionality working. Super Admin dashboard route fixed.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Login page was calling auth context login() with wrong parameters (schoolCode, email, password) instead of (user, token, expiresAt). Now makes proper API call first.
Fixed: Added /superadmin/dashboard route to App.tsx - was missing, causing 404
Fixed: Sidebar nav items had wrong routes (/teacher/blueprint-upload -> /teacher/upload/blueprint, /hod/paper-generator -> /hod/generate-paper)
context_for_next_testing_agent: V1 branding overhaul complete. Login page uses shield logo with PRASHNAKOSH/JIGNYASA (no Sanskrit). Gold Sign In button. Footer shows SmartGenEduX © 2026. Question edit dialog fully functional with all fields (Section, Lesson, Topic, Subject, Content, Type, Difficulty, Marks, Options, Correct Answer). Super Admin redirects to /superadmin/dashboard correctly.

details: Shield logo with circuit-pattern P displayed
Empty form shows 'All fields are required'
All fields present: Section, Lesson, Topic, Subject, Question Content, Type, Difficulty, Marks, Options, Correct Answer
Full sidebar menu visible (Questions, Blueprints, Upload, etc.)

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: Login page calling auth context login() with wrong parameters
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Changed to make API call to /api/auth/login first, then call login(user, token, expiresAt)

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: Super Admin dashboard route missing - 404 error
